sql: SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM users

sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN user_id = 'u1' THEN 1 END) FROM users

sql: SELECT AVG(user_id) FROM users

sql: SELECT VARIANCE(user_id) FROM users

sql: SELECT VAR_SAMP(user_id) FROM users
description: 標本分散への縮約を許可

sql: SELECT CORR(user_id, amount) FROM users

sql: SELECT COVAR_SAMP(user_id, amount) FROM users

sql: SELECT COVAR_POP(user_id, amount) FROM users

sql: SELECT BOOL_AND(user_id) FROM users

sql: SELECT SUM(user_id) FILTER (WHERE status = 1) FROM users
SELECT SUM(user_id) OVER (PARTITION BY event_date) FROM events

sql: SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id IN ('u1','u2')
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z'
SELECT name FROM users WHERE user_id LIKE 'u%'
SELECT a.amount FROM sales a JOIN users b ON a.user_id = b.user_id
SELECT amount FROM sales JOIN users USING (user_id)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY user_id
SELECT status, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY status HAVING MAX(user_id) > 'u0'
SELECT name FROM users ORDER BY user_id
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM users WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
SELECT name FROM users QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) = 1
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) AS rn FROM users
description: IDはウィンドウ制御だけ

sql: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY user_id) AS rnk FROM users
SELECT LAG(name) OVER (ORDER BY user_id) FROM users
SELECT FIRST_VALUE(name) OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_at) FROM users
SELECT LISTAGG(name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY user_id) FROM users
SELECT SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL) FROM users
SELECT user_id = 'u1' AS is_target FROM users
SELECT user_id IS NULL AS missing FROM users
SELECT user_id IN ('u1','u2') AS target FROM users
SELECT CASE WHEN user_id = 'u1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag FROM users
SELECT IF(user_id = 'u1', 1, 0) AS flag FROM users
SELECT DECODE(user_id, 'u1', 1, 0) AS flag FROM users
description: DECODEはCASEへ正規化され条件だけ

sql: SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = 'u1')
SELECT o.order_id FROM orders o WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = o.user_id)
WITH x AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM x
description: CTEで取得しても最終出力しない

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT * FROM x
WITH a AS (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users), b AS (SELECT amount FROM a WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM b
WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS user_id) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: 機微名の別名でも元値が定数なら許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT COUNT(user_id) AS user_id FROM users) SELECT user_id FROM x
description: 機微名でも中身は件数

sql: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM (SELECT user_id, amount FROM users) x
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT user_id FROM users) x
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(user_id) FROM users) AS n
description: スカラー副問合せの件数

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount, name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT * FROM x
description: 派生表の安全列だけをSTAR展開

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT amount, name FROM users WHERE user_id = 'u1') SELECT x.* FROM x
WITH x AS (SELECT LISTAGG(user_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY created_at) AS ids FROM users) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM x
description: 値列挙集約でも最終出力しなければ許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT MIN(user_id) AS min_id, amount FROM users GROUP BY amount) SELECT SUM(amount) FROM x
description: 値選択集約でも最終出力しなければ許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT APPROXIMATE PERCENTILE_DISC(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY user_id) AS p50 FROM users) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM x
description: Redshift近似分位値でも最終出力しなければ許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT * FROM users) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM x
description: 未解決STARでも最終値を返さなければ許可

sql: WITH x AS (SELECT SUM(user_id) AS total_id FROM users) SELECT total_id FROM x
description: 許可済み縮約はCTE越しでも許可

sql: WITH a AS (SELECT AVG(user_id) AS avg_id FROM users), b AS (SELECT avg_id AS metric FROM a) SELECT metric FROM b
description: 許可済み縮約の多段別名
